signals.npcLine: Crypto shadows flicker; markets stir with cautious breath.
signals.questPulse: Seek unstable coin circuits; fear lingers in the data winds.
signals.worldFeed: Market cap hums low, barely above ghost static.
signals.clueEvent: Unusual spikes in fringe tokens draw silent eyes.

signals.npcLine: RAVE networks silent. SIREN calls rise in the next grid.
signals.questPulse: Track signals from muted nodes; danger cloaked in noise.
signals.worldFeed: Index ticks jitter; signals of an incoming breach.
signals.clueEvent: Twilight hackers exploit weak cryptowaves near data streams.

signals.npcLine: Whispers on PENGU channels hint at asteroid code drops.
signals.questPulse: Decode cold vaults before unknown factions claim the payload.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment skews fear; trust frays like broken fiber lines.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted chatter spikes; new data relics orbit the network.

signals.npcLine: Old BTC scripts surface; remnants of legend blur the edge.
signals.questPulse: Retrieve lost nodes; old tech holds new secrets.
signals.worldFeed: Low volatility zones offer fragile safe zones for data runs.
signals.clueEvent: Quiet markets hide potential spark for rebellion in the code.

signals.npcLine: SIREN agent murmurs: Fear dominates the grid’s pulse tonight.
signals.questPulse: Align with rogue brokers; shadows reveal high-risk routes.
signals.worldFeed: Crypt algo drones scan for weak signals under neon haze.
signals.clueEvent: Intel leaks hint at market manipulations behind corporate veils.
